message:
feat(core): watcher client model with per-client view state (wa-3jewu)

Add watcher_client.rs implementing explicit client roles (Interactive vs
Watcher), per-client view state (active tab/pane with mirrored or
independent focus), role-based policy enforcement preventing watchers
from performing mutating actions, and leader auto-election with mirrored
focus propagation. 40 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
